title: Better visibility on chart widgets

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please make the widget charts more view-friendly

  1. Be able to manually label X-axis/Y-axis instead of only going through what is listed in the board
  2. Why are labels cut off? In other platforms if you re-size the graph, you should be able to see the entire label
  3. The actual value of the data point should be clearly visible on the graph. This is lacking
